title: selago marlothii
intro: Selago marlothii, also known as Cape honeysuckle or Marloth's Selago, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selago marlothii include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for use in herbal remedies.
